items.title: Take a photo of your hand
items.description: From your gallery or directly with the app. No photographer skills needed.

items.title: Choose your style
items.description: Shape, length, color, finish, everything is customizable in a few taps.

items.title: See your result
items.description: The AI generates your real manicure, on your real hands. In seconds.

emma.title: What if someone chose
emma.subtitle: Emma is your personal style assistant. Tell her the occasion, show her your outfit and she suggests the nails that make the wow effect.

features.title: For every moment in your life
features.description: Wedding, party, date, important meeting… Emma knows exactly what you need for every occasion.

features.title: Matched to what you're wearing
features.description: Send a photo of your outfit. Emma picks nails that perfectly complement it for a cohesive look.

features.title: Just for you, not for everyone
features.description: No generic suggestions. Emma knows you and only proposes what will make you shine.

pricing.title: How many times do you change your mind before your next appointment?
pricing.subtitle: Test every style you want, before making up your mind.

testimonials.title: They never book an appointment without trying it first
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of women who know exactly what they want before walking into the salon

items.name: Sophie M.
items.text: I could finally show my nail tech exactly what I wanted. No more bad surprises!

items.name: Lea D.
items.text: Amazing! I tried so many styles before my wedding to find the perfect one. 100% recommend.

items.name: Camille R.
items.text: Super practical and the result looks so realistic. I use MakeMyNails before every appointment now.

items.name: Julie B.
items.text: Best investment for someone who changes styles often. It saved me from several regrets!
